exort.message.no_storage_adjacent: Mu'yuk bloque ta stsobel ta sts'el.
exort.message.multiple_storages_adjacent: Ep stsobel yakal ta xch'akel. Ak'o jun no'ox.
exort.message.storage_load_failed: Ma xju' xkuch stsobel. Ilaw ta console.
exort.message.storage_loading: Yakal xkuch stsobel. Pas yan vuelta ta jun set'.
exort.message.operation_failed: Abtel ma xju'. Ilaw ta console.
exort.message.only_player: Ja' no'ox jugadores xu' spasik li comandoe.
exort.message.give_dropped: Inventario yu'un %2$s ch'ay; laj xchik %1$s item ta sts'el.
exort.message.give_partial: Ja' no'ox %1$s ta %2$s item laj spasel ta %3$s.
exort.message.debug_storage_invalid: UUID stsobel o sbi jugador ma lekuk.
exort.message.debug_storage_missing: Mu'yuk ta stael tier stsobel yu'un %1$s.
exort.message.usage_debug_player: ak' ta ilel stsobel yakal o slajebal yu'un jugador
exort.message.usage_debug_storage: jam stsobel ta id o slajebal stsobel yu'un jugador
exort.message.usage_debug_cache: il cache stsobel sok xch'akel network skuchoj
exort.message.usage_debug_benchmark: ta sjakel o smakel load benchmark
exort.message.usage_give_items: Items: storage_core, terminal, crafting_terminal, monitor, import_bus, export_bus, wire, wireless_terminal
exort.message.help_reload: kuch yan vuelta config sok runtime
exort.message.debug_load_usage: Biti'il: /exort debug benchmark start [players] [seconds] | /exort debug benchmark stop
exort.message.debug_load_started: Load test laj sjakel yu'un %1$s jugadores simulated.
exort.message.debug_load_verdict: Chapanel load test: %1$s (TPS min %2$s, max %3$s, avg %4$s, p1 %5$s; MSPT min %6$s, max %7$s, avg %8$s, p95 %9$s, p99 %10$s)
exort.message.debug_load_rare_stalls: Stalls bik'it: %1$s sample ta yolon TPS 12, min %2$s.
exort.message.debug_load_summary: Modelo benchmark: players %1$s, chunks %2$s, storages/chunk %3$s, buses/chunk %4$s, monitors/chunk %5$s, est ops/tick %6$s (global %7$s, chunk %8$s), db/tick %9$s, monitor updates %10$s/t%11$s, wire %12$s/%13$s miss %14$s%% cover %15$s%%, measured window %16$ss after setup (min warmup %17$ss), jitter %18$s%%, guard players %19$s, guard entities %20$s/%21$s, guard churn %22$s/tick, world lanes %23$s, world ops/tick %24$s, world blocks %25$s, water-test wire length %26$s, water sources %27$s, water extra chunks %28$s
exort.message.debug_load_measurement_sta: Laj sjakel smelol benchmark patil setup sok water-flow stabilizacion.
exort.message.debug_load_hints: Sna'obtasel benchmark synthetic: dominant %1$s; CPU %2$s%%, WIRE %3$s%%, DISPLAYS %4$s%%, DB %5$s%%, WIRELESS %6$s%%, GUARDS %7$s%%, WORLD %8$s%% (placements %9$s).
exort.message.debug_load_mspt_verdict: Chapanel MSPT lek x-och: %1$s (avg %2$s, p95 %3$s, p99 %4$s).
exort.message.debug_load_metadata: Metadata benchmark: server %1$s, Exort %2$s, Java %3$s, plugins %4$s.
exort.message.debug_load_recent_runs: Benchmark ach' (%1$s): TPS avg %2$s, MSPT avg %3$s, MSPT p95 %4$s.
exort.message.debug_load_move_away: Lok'an %1$s chunks ta Exort blocks o mak benchmark.simulateDisplays.
exort.message.debug_cache_started: Cache verbose logging laj sjakel (mode: %1$s, filtro: %2$s).
exort.message.debug_cache_mode_invalid: Modo cache verbose mu'yuk k'ajbil: %1$s. A'yej compact/normal/full.
exort.message.debug_worldedit_mode_inval: Modo debug WorldEdit ma lekuk: %1$s. A'yej compact/normal/full.
exort.message.debug_pick_mode_invalid: Modo pick verbose ma lekuk: %1$s. A'yej compact/normal/full.
exort.message.debug_culling_started: Display culling verbose logging laj sjakel (mode: %1$s).
exort.message.debug_culling_stopped: Display culling verbose logging laj smakel.
exort.message.debug_culling_mode_invalid: Modo display culling verbose ma lekuk: %1$s. A'yej compact/normal/full.
exort.message.debug_culling_client_inval: Jugador mu'yuk k'ajbil yu'un culling client bypass: %1$s.
exort.message.debug_culling_client_statu: Client culling bypass yu'un %1$s: manual=%2$s, auto=%3$s, source=%4$s, effective=%5$s, config=%6$s. Client probe: %7$s.
exort.message.debug_cache_status_evict: Evict: eligible=%1$s idleMs=%2$s/%3$s dirty=%4$s viewers=%5$s loading=%6$s
exort.message.debug_cache_status_marker_: Storage marker mu'yuk ta stael ta chunks skuchoj (chunk xu' unloaded).
exort.message.debug_cache_status_chunk: Chunk: loaded=%1$s level=%2$s forceLoaded=%3$s pluginTickets=%4$s players=%5$s
exort.message.debug_cache_status_connect: Nodes network skuchoj: terminals=%1$s monitors=%2$s buses=%3$s total=%4$s
Mu'yuk terminals/monitors/buses skuchoj ch'akel ta li stsobele.
exort.message.version: Exort Storage Network v%1$s yu'un phantomfighterxx
exort.message.usage_language_status: ak' ta ilel k'op yakal sok dictionaries
exort.message.usage_mode_info: ak' ta ilel modo config sok modo effective
exort.message.usage_resourcepack_status: ak' ta ilel estado pipeline resource-pack
exort.message.usage_resourcepack_rebuild: pas yan vuelta sok reload pack pipeline
exort.message.usage_resourcepack_send: tak'in pack listo ta jugador o ta spisil
exort.message.mode_set: Modo config laj stabel ta %1$s; modo effective: %2$s.
exort.message.mode_fix_paper_missing: Ma xu' xjambel RESOURCE mode: mu'yuk file config Paper ta %1$s.
exort.message.mode_fix_paper_error: Ma xu' xjambel RESOURCE mode: ma xju' xpasesel o xach'ubtasel %1$s: %2$s. Ts'ibaj %3$s: true ta file li'i sok restart server.
exort.message.mode_fix_paper_access_deni: Ma xu' xjambel RESOURCE mode: Exort ma xu' sts'ibaj %1$s. Ilaw permissions file, o ts'ibaj %2$s: true sok restart server.
exort.message.mode_fix_paper_changed: Paper config laj yach'ubtasel: %1$s set to true ta %2$s.
exort.message.mode_fix_paper_restart_req: Paper config oy xa %1$s: true ta %2$s, pero Paper runtime to'ox sk'an restart.
exort.message.mode_fix_exort_changed: Exort config laj yach'ubtasel: mode laj stabel ta RESOURCE.
exort.message.mode_blocked: Ma xu' xjambel RESOURCE: Paper's block-updates.disable-chorus-plant-updates mu'yuk sjakel.
exort.message.pack_sent: Solicitud resource pack laj tak'in ta %1$s.
exort.message.pack_sent_all: Solicitud resource pack laj tak'in ta %1$s jugadores.
exort.message.pack_status.provider_note: Resource-pack handoff listo yu'un %1$s; provider ya xchi' ta startup/pack generation. Mi %1$s ay sjakel xa, pas restart o reload provider manual.
exort.message.resource_pack.required_fai: Resource pack Exort sk'an xk'ot ma xju'. Och yan vuelta sok ich'o.
exort.message.lang_status_index_fetched: Index laj tael ta vuelta li'i
exort.gui.list_truncated: Yakal ta ilel sba %1$s stacks; pich'o search.
